overall_assessment: No blocking security findings in this lane. Direct account-scoped AccountUser::createToken is runtime-guarded, issuer context is user/account/ability-hash validated and restored, account-bound bearer tokens are rejected on missing or mismatched account_id, tokenCan applies wildcard-aware ceiling before live current-account permission revalidation, and package push account routes carry account middleware plus scoped abilities.
recommended_path: RR-AUTH-03 can proceed to triple audit / Claude comparison from this security lane. Any remaining non-security verification debt, including the documented full-suite clean-attribution question, should be handled by its owning audit lane.
